# nlohmann/json

Vendored single-header copy of nlohmann/json for optional future JSON helpers.

- Source: https://github.com/nlohmann/json
- Version banner: 3.12.0
- Source revision used locally: `25c58ac6b` (`v3.11.3-377-g25c58ac6b`)
- Headers: `json.hpp`, `json_fwd.hpp`
- License: MIT, see `LICENSE.MIT`

This header is not wired into oklib targets yet. Keep core oklib APIs free of
JSON dependencies unless an explicit optional JSON module is added later.
